steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The study established that genetic similarities correlate with behavioral similarities. The decisive clue is the phrase “similar trainability behavior, suggesting that____” — it directly references the prior claim that genetic links explain behavioral overlaps.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D explicitly ties the observed behavior in French bulldogs and bullmastiffs to a shared genetic basis, mirroring the study’s pattern. A and C misinterpret the study’s scope (comparisons or individual differences), while B reverses the genetic-behavioral causality. That matches choice D — D is correct.
